title: poa flexuosa subsp. flexuosa
intro: Poa flexuosa subsp. flexuosa, also known as Flexuous Meadow-grass, is a subspecies of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Poa flexuosa subsp. flexuosa include its ability to reduce swelling and pain, ease congestion, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for stress and anxiety relief. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
